data.title: Update 3D model and popover menu to reflect nav changes

data.body: Note from Julianna (2026-04-14). Follow-up to FRAC-161 (hide Political Club + People) and FRAC-163 (rename to Visit/Education/Publications): the 3D octahedron hero model (src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx, FractalObject.tsx) still has a face for Political Club that was explicitly out of scope in FRAC-161's plan. Also update the popover/overlay menu for visual parity with the reduced 6-section nav. Scope: (1) decide whether to remove or repurpose the Political Club face on the octahedron; (2) audit popover menu styling/spacing now that it has 6 buttons instead of 8; (3) verify labels match the new house names. Not yet started — this is a scoping note.

data.reason: orchestrator advancing to impl, plan embedded in dispatch prompt
